Class SecretMessage

java.lang.Object
secret_message.SecretMessage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SecretMessage extends Object implements Serializable
Class which is able to save several messages and implements java.io.Serializable
Version:
1.4 03/2026
Author:
J.-C. BOISSON 03/2020
